\noindent Figure 5.11 provides the QQ plot for \ttblue{ussteamco.mod.2}, with the three largest Studentized residuals identified.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%

\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
resid_std_mod2 = (ussteamco_mod_2.resid - ussteamco_mod_2.resid.mean()) / ussteamco_mod_2.resid.std(ddof=1)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 5))
qqplot(resid_std_mod2, line='45', fit=True, ax=ax, color='#00338D', alpha=0.8)
ax.set_title('QQ Plot of Standardized Residuals (mod.2)')
ax.set_xlabel('Theoretical Quantiles')
ax.set_ylabel('Standardized Residuals')
ax.grid(alpha=0.25)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
\end{Verbatim}
